question:
Soil formation is controlled by the following factors :
I. Parent material
II. Topography
III. Climate
IV. Biological activity
V. Time
Which of the above are active factors ?

Match the following :
List-I (Clouds)
A. Cirrus
B. Cirrostratus
C. Cirrocumulus
D. Cumulus
List-II (Description)
I. Milky appearance
II. Silky appearance
III. Cauliflower structure
IV. Small globular masses
Choose the correct answer using the codes given below :

options.1:
A B C D
I II III IV
options.2:
A B C D
II I IV III
options.3:
A B C D
IV III II I
options.4:
A B C D
III IV I II

question:
Consider the following statements :
I. Doldrums are the strong winds that have rapid surface movement.
II. The prevailing trade wind direction in northern hemisphere is northwest.
Which of the above statements is/are correct ?
